title: Endermorphosis (Endermites to Shulkers!)
description: Adds a new item that can be fed to endermites to allow them to burrow into purpur blocks and morph into shulkers.
body:
Endermorphosis is a mod/data-pack that grants endermites the ability to burrow into purpur blocks, pillars or double slabs to transform into shulkers in a way that is implemented differently compared to other mods of that follow a similar concept. It does so by adding a custom item which can be fed (dropped onto) endermites instead of the usual waiting game (waiting remains a mandatory step in achieving the mod's purpose, mind you).

 

## Endermetabolic Paste
This is the item that will be fed to endermites in order to allow them to burrow into purpur blocks. It can be crafted by dropping the following items into an **empty cauldron:**
- 1x Nether Wart
- 1x Thick Potion (can either be normal, splash or lingering)
- 1x Magma Cream
- 1x Chorus Flower
 

Now that you have your paste, it's time to get smashing some pearls. Upon encountering an endermite, you may, as stated earlier, drop the item onto it and watch as it chows down on its mystical snack.

 

Finally, after waiting for a bit (roughly 20 seconds after the paste has been fully consumed), lure the endermite onto a purpur block, purpur pillar or a double purpur slab block and feast your eyes on the magic that proceeds to unfold before you.

 

### Here's a video showcasing the whole mod in action!
[https://www.youtube.com/shorts/hv6D9NVtD1k](https://www.youtube.com/shorts/hv6D9NVtD1k)
